name: Abandoned
short_description: Abandoned is a survival horror game set in an abandoned building with authentic abandoned building exploration. To survive you must find all the keys in order to escape while avoiding the creatures that lurk within.
detailed_description: Abandoned is a survival horror game set in an abandoned building with authentic abandoned building exploration. To survive you must find all the keys in order to escape while avoiding the creatures that lurk within.
